title: NousResearch/hermes-agent
friendlyTitle: Hermes Agent is an open-source AI sidekick framework
summary: Hermes Agent is an open-source, provider-agnostic AI agent framework with terminal use, messaging gateways, scheduled automations, persistent memory, profiles, skills, and multi-platform deployment. The project emphasizes agents that can learn reusable skills and operate across CLI, chat platforms, and remote infrastructure.
friendlySummary: Hermes Agent lets people run an AI assistant in the terminal, messaging apps, scheduled jobs, and custom workflows.
whyItMatters: It is useful for people who want one AI agent system that can run in a terminal, Discord, Slack, Telegram, cron jobs, and custom workflows while keeping local skills and memory. Developers can also study it as a full-stack reference for tool-calling agents.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Use it if you want an AI helper that can remember workflows, use tools, run automations, and work from more than one place.
